---
title: "About"
date-modified: today
format: html
---

## Team

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Dr. Arun Mitra Peddireddy *(lead)*
Asst Prof, Dept of CFM, AIIMS Bibinagar.
Public health data science, spatial epidemiology, infectious disease modelling.
Trained at LSHTM; member of the R Epidemics Consortium (RECon), Imperial College.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Prof. Biju Soman
Professor, Achutha Menon Centre for Health Science Studies (AMCHSS), SCTIMST Trivandrum. Lead architect of the AMCHSS COVID-19 Dashboard featured in Session 5.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Dr. Gurpreet Singh
Associate Professor, Armed Forces Medical College (AFMC), Pune. Co-author of the Indian COVID-19 reproduction-number analyses that this workshop draws on.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Dr. Adrija Roy
Public health researcher and trainer. Workshop co-facilitator.
:::

:::

## Acknowledgments

This workshop draws on teaching material and ideas shared by:

- **Sebastian Funk** (LSHTM) — the *Introduction to Infectious Disease Modelling* course structure.
- **The Epiverse-TRACE community** — the modern Indian / global infectious-disease modelling toolkit in R.
- **Allison Horst** — open-licensed dplyr illustrations used in Session 2.
- **Federica Gazzelloni** — the SIR animation idea (R-Ladies Rome 2023).
- **AMCHSS / SCTIMST Trivandrum** — the live dashboard featured as the closing case study.

## Third-party assets — attribution

| Asset                                                    | Source                                              | Licence                |
|----------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------------------|
| Allison Horst dplyr illustrations (`images/tot_dplyr_*.png`) | [github.com/allisonhorst](https://github.com/allisonhorst/stats-illustrations)  | CC-BY 4.0              |
| Funk pathogen photos (`images/funk/raw/slide_009_*.png`) | S. Funk, LSHTM IDM course                           | Educational use, credit |
| COVID-19 case data (`data/covid_india_daily.csv`)        | JHU CSSE                                            | CC-BY 4.0              |
| POLYMOD contact matrix                                   | `socialmixr::polymod` (R-Universe)                  | CC-BY 4.0              |
| `outbreaks::ebola_sim_clean$linelist`                    | `outbreaks` R package                               | MIT                    |
| `codefrag` Quarto extension                              | [mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-codefrag](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-codefrag) | MIT |

## Licence

- **Code** in this repository (`*.R`, `*.qmd`, `_quarto.yml`, prep scripts) — [MIT License](https://github.com/drarunmitra/idm-jhapsmcon-2026/blob/main/LICENSE).
- **Slide content, prose, and original images** — [CC-BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/). Reuse freely with attribution.
- Third-party assets retain their original licences — see the table above.

## Contact

For questions, errors, or to contribute back, open an [issue on GitHub](https://github.com/drarunmitra/idm-jhapsmcon-2026/issues) or email Dr. Arun Mitra Peddireddy.
